description: Keep native launcher as default shortcut target
notes: Desktop shortcut refresh now prefers Launcher.exe when present
Script runs no longer revert Launcher.lnk back to PowerShell by default
Improved native menu readability

description: Add native menu bar and About dialog with update check
notes: Added File and Help navigation menu in native app
Added About dialog with creator and copyright details
Added Check for Updates action inside About

description: Default native launcher runs are now live (Dry Run off)
notes: Native UI now opens with Dry Run unchecked by default
Start and Close actions run live unless Dry Run is manually enabled
Rebuilt the installer for the 1.1.6 release line

description: Ship the native WPF launcher as the installed app
notes: Installer now packages the native WPF executable as the main launcher
Start Menu and Desktop shortcuts now open Launcher.exe directly
Rebuilt the installer for the 1.1.5 release line

description: Recognize already-open Visual Mfg login windows
notes: Visual Mfg running-state detection now includes login titles
Already-open Visual Mfg login windows are more likely to be skipped correctly
Rebuilt the installer for the 1.1.4 release line

description: Fix launch rerun detection across all apps
notes: Launch-step title and process checks now behave as alternatives when both are configured
Native detection uses the same skip rule as the PowerShell launcher
Rebuilt the installer for the 1.1.3 release line

description: Improve Access rerun detection for Visual Board and Stockroom Analytics
notes: Access-backed rerun detection now matches both normalized database paths and database filenames
Visual Board and Stockroom Analytics are less likely to relaunch when already open
Rebuilt the installer for the 1.1.2 release line

description: Fix rerun detection for Access-backed launch steps
notes: Access-backed launch steps now recognize MSACCESS as the running process
Visual Board and Stockroom Analytics reruns now skip when their Access session is already open
Rebuilt the installer for the 1.1.1 release line

description: Native migration baseline promoted to active version line
notes: Preserved native WPF app shell and Launcher.Core migration foundation
Preserved native settings edit/save workflow and initial native detection actions
Version line moved forward to prevent false update prompts from legacy 1.0.x entries

description: Native migration baseline (Build 1)
notes: Introduced native WPF app shell and Launcher.Core foundation
Added native settings edit/save workflow and initial native detection actions
Added native publish profile and win-x64 publish script

description: Lock-key ShouldProcess analyzer warning cleanup
notes: Resolved duplicate analyzer warnings for lock-key helper verbs
Updated lock-key helper structure to satisfy ShouldProcess expectations
Rebuilt installer and aligned runtime, installer, and manifest versioning to 1.0.37

description: Fix extra Access start page during Stockroom step
notes: Access database launch now uses MSACCESS.EXE with /nostartup
Reduced chance of extra Access start-page windows during Stockroom launch
Rebuilt installer and aligned runtime, installer, and manifest versioning to 1.0.36

description: Receiver month folder now uses month name and year
notes: Changed Receiver month folder format to MMMM yyyy
Kept Receiver date folder format as MM_dd_yyyy
Rebuilt installer and aligned runtime, installer, and manifest versioning to 1.0.35

description: Receiver month/date folder auto-create and open
notes: Receiver step now checks and creates current month folder before launch
Receiver step now checks and creates current date folder with MM_dd_yyyy format
Launcher opens the resolved date folder target for Receiver

description: Explicit per-step running checks with clearer logging
notes: Each launch step now logs whether it is running or not before launch/skip
Reduced generic running-title aliases that could cause false app matches
Rebuilt installer and aligned runtime, installer, and manifest versioning to 1.0.33

description: Reduce false already-running skips across launch steps
notes: Tightened running-state checks to avoid false skips when applications are closed
When both window and process candidates exist, both now must match
Avoided inferred process-name checks for directory launch targets

description: Fix Visual Mfg false already-running skip
notes: Removed overly broad Visual Mfg running-window/process candidates
Visual Mfg now uses stricter identifiers for already-running detection
Rebuilt installer and aligned runtime, installer, and manifest versioning to 1.0.31

description: Maintenance release for version alignment
notes: Published a maintenance release to keep runtime, installer, and manifest versions aligned
Rebuilt the installer package for distribution

description: Approved verb rename for lock-key helper
notes: Renamed the lock-key helper to use an approved PowerShell verb
Preserved the existing lock-key enforcement behavior and call flow
Rebuilt installer and aligned runtime, installer, and manifest versioning to 1.0.29

description: Lock-key fallback binding fix and version sync
notes: Fixed lock-key fallback conversion handling to prevent boolean parameter binding failures
Preserved non-fatal lock-key enforcement so launcher completion is not interrupted
Rebuilt installer and aligned runtime and installer versioning to 1.0.27

description: Receiver folder detection and non-fatal lock-key toggles
notes: Added explicit Explorer folder-window detection for directory launch steps
Made lock-key SendKeys failures warning-only to prevent run termination
Preserved existing already-open app detection and skip behavior

description: Improved already-open detection for launch steps
notes: Expanded already-open detection to include broader window-title candidates
Always performs process fallback checks even when title candidates exist
Added MSACCESS fallback process detection for Access launch targets

description: Launcher now skips steps that are already open
notes: Added launch-step detection so reruns only launch missing applications
Added per-step override fields: launchOnlyIfMissing, runningWindowTitles, runningProcessNames
Kept CLOSE prompt and lock-key reliability improvements

description: Restored CLOSE prompt and improved lock-key reliability
notes: Restored the idle CLOSE command prompt
Added lock-key state verification and retries for Caps Lock and Num Lock
Preserved Visual Board main-window maximize behavior

description: Visual Board maximize now targets the main program window
notes: Fixed the Visual Board pre-login maximize behavior to target the main program window
Kept the interactive update prompt flow
Preserved the passive idle state after all steps complete

description: Launcher restores the interactive update prompt flow
notes: Restored the interactive update prompt before downloading and installing
Disabled required pre-run update mode by default
Preserved the passive idle launcher behavior after all steps complete

description: Launcher now stays open in a passive idle state after startup steps complete
notes: Launcher now stays open in a passive idle state after all configured steps complete
Removed the CLOSE input prompt from the idle path
Preserved the Caps Lock and Num Lock end-of-run fix

description: Launcher now exits automatically after startup steps complete
notes: Launcher exits automatically after all configured steps complete
Preserved the Caps Lock and Num Lock end-of-run fix
Updated update integration to tolerate missing Details payloads

description: Hotfix release for Stockroom Analytics target and UNC fallback resolution
notes: Updated Stockroom Analytics to launch the actual .accdb file path
Fixed JSON UNC escaping for fallbackProgramPath so the fallback path remains valid
Rebuilt installer and release metadata for v1.0.18
